user.title: Knob Swipe Navigation
user.description: Choose the ZHA rotary knob device that should control enabled dashboards.

data_description.device_id: Only devices already provided by the ZHA integration can be used. Choose the rotary knob that emits rotate_type events.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Knob Swipe Navigation
reconfigure.description: Choose the ZHA rotary knob device that should control enabled dashboards.

data_description.device_id: Only devices already provided by the ZHA integration can be used. Choose the rotary knob that emits rotate_type events.

error.not_zha_device: Select a device provided by ZHA.

abort.already_configured: Knob Swipe Navigation is already configured.

device_not_zha.message: The configured knob device is no longer provided by ZHA. Reconfigure Knob Swipe Navigation and select a ZHA device.

device_not_zha.title: Selected knob device is unavailable
device_not_zha.description: The configured knob device is not currently provided by ZHA. Open the Knob Swipe Navigation integration, start reconfiguration, and select a ZHA rotary knob device.
